message:
refactor: Split Python/ceval.zig into modular directory structure

Split 1249-line ceval.zig (CPython mirror) into focused submodules:
- pending_calls.zig (122 lines) - pending call system
- state.zig (62 lines) - CEvalState and eval breaker flags
- tracing.zig (79 lines) - trace/profile hooks
- operations.zig (52 lines) - binary/compare operations
- recursion.zig (44 lines) - recursion limit checking
- thread_switch.zig (32 lines) - check interval
- frame_eval.zig (48 lines) - frame evaluation control
- async_gen.zig (42 lines) - coroutine/async gen hooks
- signals.zig (34 lines) - signal handling
- pattern_match.zig (148 lines) - exception/mapping/class matching
- unpack.zig (189 lines) - iterable unpacking

Main file now 197-line re-export module. Maintains CPython mirror
convention with ceval.zig + ceval/ directory.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+/// Binary and Compare operations for ceval
+/// Mirrors part of cpython/Python/ceval.c
+
+/// Binary operation codes
+pub const BinaryOp = enum(u8) {
+    add = 0,
+    sub = 1,
+    mult = 2,
+    matmult = 3,
+    div = 4,
+    mod = 5,
+    pow = 6,
+    lshift = 7,
+    rshift = 8,
+    or_ = 9,
+    xor = 10,
+    and_ = 11,
+    floordiv = 12,
+    truediv = 13,
+    inplace_add = 14,
+    inplace_sub = 15,
+    inplace_mult = 16,
+    inplace_matmult = 17,
+    inplace_div = 18,
+    inplace_mod = 19,
+    inplace_pow = 20,
+    inplace_lshift = 21,
+    inplace_rshift = 22,
+    inplace_or = 23,
+    inplace_xor = 24,
+    inplace_and = 25,
+    inplace_floordiv = 26,
+    inplace_truediv = 27,
+};
+
+/// Compare operation codes
+pub const CompareOp = enum(u8) {
+    lt = 0,
+    le = 1,
+    eq = 2,
+    ne = 3,
+    gt = 4,
+    ge = 5,
+};
+
+/// Conversion function types for format strings
+pub const ConversionFunc = enum(u8) {
+    none = 0,
+    str = 's',
+    repr = 'r',
+    ascii = 'a',
+};
